mapper.select: select g.* from group_chat g, group_member m where g.groupId = m.groupId and m.userId = #{userId} order by g.createTime desc
select u.userId as friendId, u.username as friendName from group_member m, user u where m.groupId = #{groupId} and m.userId = u.userId
mapper.insert: insert into group_chat (groupName, ownerId, createTime) values (#{groupName}, #{ownerId}, now())
insert into group_member (groupId, userId, joinTime) values (#{groupId}, #{userId}, now())
mapper.select: select count(*) from group_member where groupId = #{groupId} and userId = #{userId}
select content from message where sessionId = #{groupId} order by postTime desc limit 1
